## Entities.Confections.AnyFillingOption type

Discriminated union of filling options. Satisfies IHasId<FillingOptionId> for use with IOptionsWithPreferred.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyFillingOption = IRecipeFillingOption | IIngredientFillingOption;
```
